data.name: IdempotentMigrationScriptsNotSupported
data.value: Idempotent migration scripts are not supported for XuguDB.

data.name: DatabaseCreateNotSupported
data.value: Database creation is not supported for XuguDB through EF Core.

data.name: DatabaseDeleteNotSupported
data.value: Database deletion is not supported for XuguDB through EF Core.

data.name: HasTablesNotSupported
data.value: HasTables is not supported for XuguDB through EF Core.

data.name: IncompatibleIdentityColumn
data.value: Property '{0}' on entity type '{1}' cannot use XuguDB IDENTITY with CLR type '{2}'.

data.name: ServerVersionCannotChange
data.value: The ServerVersion option cannot be changed once the context has been initialized.

data.name: SetCompatibleModeOnOpenCannotChange
data.value: The SetCompatibleModeOnOpen option cannot be changed once the context has been initialized.

data.name: IndexTableRequired
data.value: Index operations require a table name for XuguDB.

data.name: IndexTypeNotSupportedForMigration
data.value: Index type '{0}' cannot be generated in XuguDB migration DDL (supported: BTREE, BITMAP).

data.name: FilteredIndexesNotSupported
data.value: Filtered indexes are not supported in XuguDB migration DDL.

data.name: ScaffoldingColumnNotFound
data.value: Column '{0}' not found on table '{1}'.

data.name: InternalLocalAnnotationLeaked
data.value: The migration operation of type '{0}' leaked the internal local annotation '{1}'.

data.name: RenameColumnRequiresModel
data.value: Renaming column '{0}' on table '{1}' requires the target model because XuguDB has no native RENAME COLUMN syntax.

data.name: RenameColumnIdentityNotSupported
data.value: Renaming identity column '{0}' on table '{1}' is not supported in XuguDB migrations.

data.name: IdentityPrimaryKeyTypeChangeNotSupported
data.value: Changing the store type of identity primary key column '{0}' on table '{1}' requires manual table rebuild in XuguDB.

data.name: RetryingExecutionStrategyNotSupported
data.value: Automatic retry (EnableRetryOnFailure) is not yet supported for XuguDB. See docs/LIMITATIONS.md.

data.name: XgciHintE34412
data.value: XGCI E34412 usually indicates a high-precision numeric result was read as Int32. The provider casts COUNT/TIMESTAMPDIFF results; if you still see this, project BIGINT or use a converter. See docs/LIMITATIONS.md and harness/contracts/ado-driver-contract.md.

data.name: XgciHintE19230
data.value: XGCI E19230 often indicates DateTimeOffset / temporal binding mismatch. Prefer provider temporal converters or store DATETIME WITH TIME ZONE without unsupported precision suffixes. See docs/LIMITATIONS.md.

data.name: XgciHintE10049
data.value: XGCI E10049 means the function or variable does not exist (commonly ROW_COUNT). Automatic DbUpdateConcurrencyException is not supported; see docs/LIMITATIONS.md (optimistic concurrency decision C).

data.name: OptimisticConcurrencyExceptionNotSupported
data.value: Automatic DbUpdateConcurrencyException detection is not supported on XuguDB because ROW_COUNT() is unavailable (E10049). Concurrency token columns still map; applications must detect conflicts manually. See docs/LIMITATIONS.md.

data.name: SequenceRestartNotSupported
data.value: Restarting a sequence (RESTART WITH) is not supported by XuguDB ALTER SEQUENCE. Drop and recreate the sequence, or adjust MINVALUE/START via a new sequence. See reference/object/sequence.md.

data.name: ApplyNotSupported
data.value: XuguDB does not support CROSS APPLY, OUTER APPLY, or LATERAL joins. Rewrite the query to use supported JOIN/subquery shapes, or evaluate client-side. See docs/LIMITATIONS.md and reference/sql/select/from.md.
